title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Savills India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Savills India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Savills India in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Savills India:
Savills India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Savills India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
